s-1.ptxt: REPAIR INSTRUCTION

s2.ptxt: Clean the vehicle body surface.

s3.ptxt: Using a heat light, heat the vehicle body surface.

atten3.ptxt: Do not heat the vehicle body excessively.

s3.ptxt: Wipe off any tape adhesive residue with cleaner.

s2.ptxt: Installation temperature

s3.ptxt: When ambient temperature is below 15°C, perform the installation procedure after warming the vehicle body surface (installation surface of the door frame) and tape up to between 20 to 30°C using a heat light. When ambient temperature is above 35°C, cool the vehicle body surface (installation surface of the door frame) and tape down to between 20 to 30°C prior to installation.

item.ptxt: The most appropriate temperature for installing the tape is 25°C.
When the temperature is low, the tape turns stiff and comes off easily. When the temperature is high, the tape looses elasticity.

s2.ptxt: Before installation

s3.ptxt: Remove any roughness of coating and dirt on and around the vehicle body surface where the tape will be installed (installation surface of the door frame). If any roughness or dirt remains when pressing the tape onto the surface, air will be trapped under the tape and result in a poor appearance.

atten4.ptxt: Spray water on the shop floor to settle any dust.

s2.ptxt: Key points for handling the tape

s3.ptxt: The tape bends and rolls up easily. Store the tape between flat pieces of cardboard or other similar objects and keep it dry and level.

atten3.ptxt: Do not bend the tape or leave it in high temperature places.

s2.ptxt: Key points for installation of the tape (how to use a squeegee and installation procedure for flat surfaces)

item.ptxt: Conduct positioning of the tape with a high accuracy to achieve a neat finish and to avoid peeling.
The tape cannot be reused because it deforms or does not fit any more after being removed.

s3.ptxt: To avoid air bubbles, slightly raise the part of the tape that are going to be applied so that its adhesive surface does not touch the vehicle body while applying the tape. Tilt the squeegee at a 40 to 50° (for pressing forward) or 30 to 45° (for pulling) to the vehicle body surface and press the tape onto the vehicle body surface with a force of 20 to 30 N (2 to 3 kgf) at a constant slow speed of 3 to 7 cm per second.

atten3.ptxt: Be sure to observe the specified pressing speed, force, and angle of the squeegee to avoid wrinkles or air bubbles.

item.ptxt: Either angle of the squeegee (for pressing forward or for pulling) is acceptable.
Be sure to apply the tape while removing the release paper 10 to 20 mm from the edge of the squeegee.

s2.ptxt: Key points for installation of the tape (how to use a squeegee and installation procedure for hemming surfaces)

s3.ptxt: If it is difficult to press the tape, press it in several steps as shown in the illustration. Use your fingers or the padded surface of a squeegee to slowly apply the tape to the hem of the vehicle, especially for a small hem.

atten4.ptxt: When applying the tape to the backside of a hem, remove the release paper and use your fingers or the padded surface of a squeegee.

s2.ptxt: Key points for installation of the tape (how to use a squeegee and installation procedure for corners)

s3.ptxt: Remove the release paper and apply the tape carefully with your fingers.
Before applying the tape to each corner, heat the tape using a heat light and gradually apply it, to avoid wrinkles on the tape and achieve a neat finish.

s2.ptxt: Check after installation

s3.ptxt: After completing the application, check if the tape is applied neatly. If the tape is not applied neatly, reapply using new tape.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR LOWER OUTSIDE STRIPE

s2.ptxt: Refer to the illustration to position the front door lower outside stripe.
Remove the release paper and apply the stripe.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR STRIPE

atten3.ptxt: Be sure to install the front door stripe after applying the front door lower outside stripe.

s2.ptxt: Refer to the illustration to position the front door stripe.
Remove the release paper and apply the stripe.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR UPPER WINDOW FRAME MOULDING

s2.ptxt: Install the front door upper window frame moulding to the door frame.
Using an air riveter or hand riveter with a nose piece, install the front door upper window frame moulding with 7 new rivets.

atten4.ptxt: If the rivet cannot be cut, pull it once and cut it.

item.ptxt: Do not pry the rivet with the riveter, as this will cause damage to the riveter and mandrel.
Confirm that the rivets are seated properly against the moulding. Do not tilt the riveter when installing the rivet to the moulding. Do not leave any space between the rivet head and moulding.
Do not leave any space between the moulding and door frame. Firmly hold together the 2 items while installing the rivet.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR REAR WINDOW FRAME MOULDING

atten4.ptxt: When installing the front door rear window frame moulding, heat the vehicle body and front door rear window frame moulding using a heat light.

atten3.ptxt: Do not heat the vehicle body and front door window frame moulding excessively.

s2.ptxt: Clean the vehicle body surface.

s3.ptxt: Using a heat light, heat the vehicle body surface.
Remove the double-sided tape from the vehicle body.
Wipe off any tape adhesive residue with cleaner.

s2.ptxt: Clean the front door rear window frame moulding. (If reusing the front door rear window frame moulding)

s3.ptxt: Using a heat light, heat the front door rear window frame moulding.
Remove the double-sided tape from the front door rear window frame moulding.
Wipe off any tape adhesive residue with cleaner.
Apply new double-sided tape to the front door rear window frame moulding.

s2.ptxt: Install the front door rear window frame moulding.

s3.ptxt: Using a heat light, heat the vehicle body and front door rear window frame moulding.
Remove the release paper from the front door rear window frame moulding.

atten4.ptxt: After removing the release paper, keep the exposed adhesive free from foreign matter.

s3.ptxt: Engage the clip and install the front door rear window frame moulding.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR BELT MOULDING ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 clips and 5 claws, and install the front door belt moulding assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR WEATHERSTRIP

s2.ptxt: Engage the 19 clips and install the front door weatherstrip.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR CHECK ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the front door check assembly with the 3 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR CHECK ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the front door check assembly with the bolt and 2 nuts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL DOOR ELECTRICAL KEY OSCILLATOR (w/ Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Install the door electrical key oscillator with the screw.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR OUTSIDE HANDLE FRAME SUB-ASSEMBLY (w/o Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Apply MP grease to the sliding parts of the front door outside handle frame sub-assembly.
Engage the claw to install the front door outside handle frame sub-assembly.
Using a "TORX" socket wrench (T30), install the front door outside handle frame sub-assembly with the screw.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR OUTSIDE HANDLE FRAME SUB-ASSEMBLY (w/ Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Apply MP grease to the sliding parts of the front door outside handle frame sub-assembly.
Engage the claw to install the front door outside handle frame sub-assembly.
Using a "TORX" socket wrench (T30), install the front door outside handle frame sub-assembly with the screw.
Engage the 2 clamps.
Connect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR INSIDE LOCKING CABLE ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the front door inside locking cable assembly.
Engage the 3 claws.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR LOCK REMOTE CONTROL CABLE ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the front door lock remote control cable assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR LOCK ASSEMBLY

item.ptxt: When reusing the removed front door lock assembly, replace the door lock wiring harness seal on the connector with a new one.
Do not allow grease or dust to adhere to the door lock wiring harness seal surface of the connector.

Reusing the door lock wiring harness seal or using a damaged door lock wiring harness seal may cause water intrusion to the connection. This may result in a malfunction of the front door lock assembly.

s2.ptxt: Apply MP grease to the sliding parts of the front door lock assembly.
Install a new door lock wiring harness seal to the front door lock assembly.
Insert the front door lock open rod to the front door lock assembly, and set it to the front door outside handle frame.
Make sure that the front door lock open rod is securely connected to the front door lock assembly.
Using a "TORX" socket wrench (T30), install the front door lock assembly with the 3 screws.
Connect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR REAR OUTSIDE HANDLE PAD

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws to install the front door rear outside handle pad.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR FRONT OUTSIDE HANDLE PAD

s2.ptxt: Engage the 3 claws to install the front door front outside handle pad.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR OUTSIDE HANDLE ASSEMBLY (w/o Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Insert the front end of the front door outside handle assembly into the front door outside handle frame.

Insert the rear end of the front door outside handle assembly into the front door outside handle frame. Next, slide the front door outside handle assembly toward the front of the vehicle to install it.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR OUTSIDE HANDLE ASSEMBLY (w/ Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Insert the front end of the front door outside handle assembly into the front door outside handle frame.

Insert the rear end of the front door outside handle assembly into the front door outside handle frame. Next, slide the front door outside handle assembly toward the front of the vehicle to install it.
Connect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR OUTSIDE HANDLE COVER

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws to install the front door outside handle cover to the front door lock cylinder.
Install the front door lock cylinder.

atten4.ptxt: Make sure that the front door lock cylinder rod is inserted into the front door lock assembly.

s2.ptxt: Using a "TORX" socket wrench (T30), install the front door lock cylinder with the screw.
Install the hole plug.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR REAR LOWER FRAME SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the front door rear lower frame sub-assembly with the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR FRONT LOWER FRAME SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the front door front lower frame sub-assembly with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL DOOR FRAME GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Engage the clip and install a new door frame garnish.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR GLASS RUN

s2.ptxt: Install the front door glass run.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT NO. 1 DOOR STIFFENER CUSHION

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws and install a new front No. 1 door stiffener cushion with double-sided tape.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT POWER WINDOW REGULATOR MOTOR ASSEMBLY

atten3.ptxt: The regulator arm must be below the intermediate position when installing the power window regulator motor.

s2.ptxt: Using a "TORX" driver (T25), install the front power window regulator motor sub-assembly with the 3 screws.

atten4.ptxt: A new front window regulator adopts a self-tapping method. The installation position of the regulator will be threaded when the self-tapping screw is inserted.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR WINDOW REGULATOR SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Apply MP grease to the sliding parts of the front door window regulator sub-assembly.
Install the temporary bolt to the front door window regulator sub-assembly.
Temporarily install the window regulator.
Tighten the 6 bolts in the order shown in the illustration to install the front window regulator.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR GLASS SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Insert the front door glass sub-assembly into the front door panel along the front door glass run as indicated in the order of the arrows in the illustration.
Install the front door glass sub-assembly with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR SERVICE HOLE COVER

s2.ptxt: Apply butyl tape to the front door panel.
Pass the front door lock remote control cable and rear door inside locking cable through a new front door service hole cover.
Install the new service hole cover.

atten3.ptxt: Securely install the front door service hole cover avoiding wrinkles and air bubbles.

s2.ptxt: Connect each connector and each clamp.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL OUTER REAR VIEW MIRROR ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Engage the claw to install the outer rear view mirror assembly.
Install the outer rear view mirror assembly with the 3 nuts.
Connect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT NO. 1 SPEAKER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the front No. 1 speaker assembly with the 4 bolts.
Connect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR INNER GLASS WEATHERSTRIP

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 claws and install the front door inner glass weatherstrip.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT ARMREST BASE PANEL UPPER

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 claws and install the front armrest base panel upper.
Install the 7 screws.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR WIRE (for Driver Side)

s2.ptxt: Install the front door wire with the 2 screws.
Engage the clamp.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL POWER WINDOW REGULATOR MASTER SWITCH ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector.
Install the power window regulator master switch assembly with the 3 screws.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR INSIDE HANDLE SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Connect the front door lock remote control cable and front door inside locking cable to the front door inside handle sub-assembly.
Engage the 2 claws and install the front door inside handle sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR TRIM BOARD SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Connect each connector.
Engage the front door trim board with the 4 clips of the front door inner glass weatherstrip.
Engage the 9 clips and install the front door trim board to the front door panel.
Install the 3 screws and clip (A).

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COURTESY LIGHT ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector.
Engage the claw and install the courtesy light assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL ASSIST GRIP COVER

s2.ptxt: Engage the 6 claws and install the assist grip cover.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR INSIDE HANDLE BEZEL PLUG

s2.ptxt: Engage the 3 claws and install the front door inside handle bezel plug.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR LOWER FRAME BRACKET GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 clips and install the front door lower frame bracket garnish.

s-1.ptxt: INITIALIZE POWER WINDOW CONTROL SYSTEM
